svg.title: JobAutomation system LLD
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: Angular frontend, Express bridge, and external services including OpenAI, LinkedIn and Indeed via Playwright

g.text: Runs in browser — no server needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Resume Upload page do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Job Board page do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Applications Dashboard do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Settings page store?')

g.text: Tiny local Node server — only needed to spawn Playwright

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What routes does the Express bridge expose?')
sendPrompt('How does the apply endpoint work?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI parse the resume and match jobs?')
sendPrompt('How does the Indeed scraper work?')
sendPrompt('How does LinkedIn auto-apply work with Playwright?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in localStorage?')
sendPrompt('What does Indeed return when scraped?')
sendPrompt('What happens when Playwright auto-applies on LinkedIn?')
